gloss.description: A concise, 1-2 word English gloss or a Leipzig abbreviation for grammatical particles.

ipa.description: The International Phonetic Alphabet transcription, including stress marks and syllable breaks.

syllables.description: The word broken down into its constituent CV syllables for rule validation.

slot.description: For grammatical particles, defines their position in the sentence structure. Null for content words.

concept.description: The full concept name from the unified concepts document or grammar role.

description.description: The detailed description of the concept's meaning and nuance.

sound_symbolism.description: The poetic description of how the word's sounds embody its meaning through phonetic symbolism.

grammatical_notes.description: Cross-linguistic context explaining the word's grammatical flexibility and syntactic patterns.

pillars.description: The philosophical pillars this concept primarily embodies.
